updated_conclusion: The provider descriptor row shape is now discoverable with native Reverser tooling instead of only by hand-selected addresses. A .rdata scan of the 947 win64c client found 378 rows whose duplicated slot-0/slot-1 clone/materializer thunk points back to the row and whose summarized slots include an RTTI getter.

native_recognizers: candidate row must have duplicate qword slots 0 and 1
slot 0/1 target must decode as a clone-materializer thunk that LEAs the candidate descriptor address
candidate is retained by default only when at least one summarized slot decodes as an RTTI TypeDescriptor getter
slot classifier reuses provider descriptor thunk recognizers for clone materializers, payload setters, forward jumps, RCX-adjust forwarders, and RTTI getters

relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-provider-descriptor-nativ: Generalizes the five hand-selected login/settings provider rows into a whole-section candidate discovery pass.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-config-provider-and-rtti-: Uses the Config-provider row shape as one proven instance of the row pattern now discovered at scale.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.sibling-provider-descriptor-vtables: Turns nearby-row exploration into a repeatable scanner rather than a manual address-by-address workflow.

bounded_inference.statement: The 947 win64c client contains a broad family of provider-style adapter descriptors in .rdata. The shared clone/materializer plus RTTI getter contract appears stable across hundreds of rows, while the slot-2 helper varies by provider family.
bounded_inference.confidence: high for row discovery mechanics, medium for semantic grouping before downstream callsite tracing

caveats: The scan is intentionally broad: not every candidate is tied to login/settings, JS5, or bootstrap behavior yet.
The committed raw artifact caps detailed descriptor output at the first 80 candidates; the scan counter records all 378 matching rows.
Unclassified slot-2 thunks are preserved as first-byte evidence and need separate recognizers before assigning semantic labels.
next_targets: Add callsite/xref enrichment so scanner output can group descriptors by consumers rather than only by .rdata order.
Run focused descriptor scans around 0x140B69F60, 0x140B69FC0, 0x140B83B90, and 0x140B859D8 when a compact window/range filter is available.
Add recognizers for the most common unclassified slot-2 thunk families found in the top-80 scan.
Feed discovered descriptor rows back into bootstrap, JS5, and login/settings object-lifetime maps.
